FullText: Now the chief priests and the Pharisees had given orders that , if any man knew where he was , he should report it that they might seize him .

FullText: His disciples did not understand these things at first . However when Jesus was glorified they remembered the things that were written about him . They also remembered the things that had been done to him .
ASTrns_explanation: The clause is morphologically passive, and the lexical verb licenses both an external argument (agent) and an internal argument (patient), even if the external argument is unexpressed or realised in a 'by'-phrase.
ASUncc_explanation: The clause is morphologically passive, and the lexical verb licenses an external argument (whether overtly expressed or suppressed).
